scope_note: QA Langlands Global Functional Equation cert [412]. Primary sources: Godement, R. and Jacquet, H. (1972) 'Zeta Functions of Simple Algebras' doi:10.1007/BFb0070263 (completed L-function Λ(s), functional equation Λ(s)=ε·Λ(1−s), conductor and archimedean factor for GL_n); Cogdell, J.W. (2004) 'Lectures on L-functions, Converse Theorems, and Functoriality for GL_n' ISBN 978-0-8218-3516-0 (archimedean L-factors, conductor formula, Gamma parameters for automorphic induction). CLAIM (narrow and falsifiable): For f=2.2.5.1-125.1-a (GL_2/F, F=Q(sqrt5), parallel weight k=2, conductor P_5^3, level 125=5^3), the completed L-function Λ(s,AI(f))=N^{s/2}·L_inf(s)·L(s,AI(f)) has: (C1) conductor N=5^8=390625 (only p=5 ramified, exponent a_5=8 from Artin formula 2·3+2·1=8 certified in [411]; all split/inert primes unramified giving conductor exponent 0); (C2) degree d=[F:Q]×rank(GL_2)=2×2=4 (GL_4/Q form), motivic weight w=k−1=2−1=1, analytic center at s=1/2 (computed as (w+1)/2−1/2=1−1/2=1/2, Fraction arithmetic); (C3) archimedean factor L_inf(s)=Gamma_R(s+1/2)^2·Gamma_R(s+3/2)^2 from r_1=2 real embeddings of F each contributing discrete series D_{k=2} with shifts (k-1)/2=1/2 and (k+1)/2=3/2 (4 Gamma_R factors total; all shifts are Fraction, not float — Theorem NT: no continuous function enters QA state; 2×shift ∈ {1,3} are odd positive integers confirming weight-2 type); (C4) Gamma complementarity: the shift multiset {1/2,1/2,3/2,3/2} is closed under mu → w+1−mu = 2−mu (1/2↔3/2), so each pair sums to w+1=2 — this is the archimedean signature of the functional equation self-duality Λ(s)=ε·Λ(1−s); all verified using Fraction arithmetic. Float observer projections (NOT in QA layer): ε∈C with |ε|=1 (root number, determined by Gauss sums of the CM character ψ at p=5), Gamma function evaluations, L(1/2,AI(f)). Together [403]→[404]→[405]→[406]→[407]→[408]→[409]→[410]→[411]→[412] forms the complete Langlands ladder for f=2.2.5.1-125.1-a: local Euler factors at all prime types + global functional equation skeleton. Derived 2026-06-13.
